---
title: "Descriptive Guide to the Stream of Time, or, General Outline of Universal History, Chronology and Biography, At One View"
---

## Descriptive Guide to the Stream of Time, or, General Outline of Universal History, Chronology and Biography, At One View

**Author:** William Bell
**Date:** 1810
**Imprint:** London: Vernor, Hood & Sharpe

### Notes

A translation and continuation of Friedrich Strass\'s general chronology, <i>Versuch einer allgemeinen Einleitung in die Wissenschaftenkunde</i> (1805).

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
